scope: Queensland dam dashboard 45-dam EAP flood-trigger audit
formal_activation_disclaimer: This dataset supports indicative public assessment only. It never confirms formal EAP activation.

live_data_finding.finding: All 45 current records had storage_level_m=null. Adding EAP rules alone will not make elevation-based assessment possible.
live_data_finding.prohibited_substitution: Do not substitute percent_full or a nearby river-gauge height for the EAP storage elevation.

The source table uses “up to” outflow bands. Codex must preserve ranges and must not implement them as simple <= checks without resolving each band’s lower bound from the full table.
